hero.title: Run your quizzes like a pro
hero.subtitle: All-in-one platform for managing pub quiz events, teams, scoring, and leagues.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools for every aspect of your quiz night

liveScoring.title: Live Scoring
liveScoring.description: Enter results in real-time with automatic ranking and calculations.

teams.title: Team Management
teams.description: Track teams with aliases, history, and detailed statistics.

leagues.title: Leagues & Seasons
leagues.description: Create leagues with automatic aggregate leaderboards.

stats.title: Analytics
stats.description: Detailed analytics by category, team, and time period.

helps.title: Joker & Helps
helps.description: Configurable helps with automatic score application.

export.title: Export & Share
export.description: PDF, Excel exports and public leaderboards for projectors.

questionBank.title: Question Bank
questionBank.description: Centralized question management with multiple types, media support, and bulk Excel import.

pricing.title: Simple plans
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when ready
pricing.ownerOnly: Only the organization owner can manage subscription
pricing.downgradeConfirm: Are you sure? You will lose access to Pro features at the end of your billing period.
pricing.downgradeSuccess: Subscription cancelled. You will retain Pro access until the end of your billing period.

auth.resetSuccess: Check your email for the password reset link.

qb.addDesc: Create a new question for the question bank.
qb.empty: No questions yet. Add your first one!

members.title: Members
members.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
members.inviteDescription: Enter the email address of the person you want to invite.
members.inviteNote: If the user already exists, they'll be added automatically. Otherwise, they'll receive a registration invite.
members.alreadyMember: This user is already a member of the organization.
members.addedExisting: User has been added to the organization!

settings.title: Settings
settings.freeDescription: Limited plan — upgrade for more features
settings.brandingProOnly: Full branding customization available on Pro plan only
settings.helpTypesDescription: Enable or disable helps for your quizzes.
settings.doubleChanceDescription: Allows two answers per question in one category.
settings.categoryBonusDescription: Awards +1 bonus point to the category winner.
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
settings.giftCodeDescription: Enter a gift code to activate Pro features for your organization.
settings.giftCodeAppliedForever: Gift code applied! Pro features are now active.
settings.giftCodeAppliedDays: Gift code applied! Pro features active for {{days}} days.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Deactivating your account will log you out and remove you from all organizations. If you are the owner of an organization, that organization will also be deleted.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action will remove you from all organizations.
settings.deleteAccountOwnerWarning: You are the owner of one or more organizations. Deleting your account will also delete those organizations and remove all their members.
settings.deleteAccountSuccess: Your account has been deactivated. You can reactivate it by contacting support.
settings.reactivateNote: Note: This is a soft delete. Contact support to reactivate your account in the future.

freemium.upgradeForMore: Upgrade to Premium for up to 3 admins and more members
freemium.premiumDescription: This feature is only available on the Premium plan. Upgrade to access leagues, question bank, and more.

onboarding.title: Create your organization
onboarding.subtitle: Your organization is where you manage quizzes, teams, and leagues.
onboarding.note: You can change the name later in settings.
onboarding.selectOrgSubtitle: You belong to multiple organizations. Choose the one you want to work in.

cookies.message: We use essential cookies to ensure the platform works properly.

excel.importDescription: Select an Excel file with quiz results. Format must match the export format.

landing.faqSubtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about the platform
landing.instructionsSubtitle: A quick start guide in a few simple steps
landing.step1Desc: Sign up and create your organization. It represents your quiz club or team of organizers.
landing.step2Desc: Enter the teams that participate and the question categories you use at your quizzes.
landing.step3Desc: Create a quiz, select teams and categories, then enter scores live during the event.
landing.step4Desc: View detailed statistics by team, category, and season. Create leagues for long-term tracking.
landing.contactSubtitle: Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible
landing.contactSuccess: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
landing.contactError: Error sending message. Please try again.
landing.noFaq: FAQ items will be added soon.

map.title: Find Pub Quizzes Near You
map.subtitle: Search quiz nights by city, country, venue, or distance.
map.searchPlaceholder: Search by city, country, venue or organizer...
map.noResults: No quiz locations found. Try adjusting your search or filters.
map.organizerCtaDesc: Register your organization and put your quizzes on the map!

mapSettings.title: Public Map Visibility
mapSettings.description: Control whether your organization and quiz locations appear on the public map.
mapSettings.locationsDescription: Manage your quiz venues and their schedules.
mapSettings.noLocations: No locations added yet. Add your first quiz venue!
